changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.schedule( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, school_id bigint NOT NULL, name varchar NOT NULL, is_deleted boolean DEFAULT FALSE, CONSTRAINT fk_school_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY (school_id) REFERENCES public.school(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.cabinet( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, school_id bigint NOT NULL, name varchar NOT NULL, is_deleted boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, CONSTRAINT fk_school_cabinet_id FOREIGN KEY (school_id) REFERENCES public.school(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.teacher( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, school_id bigint NOT NULL, name varchar NOT NULL, is_deleted boolean DEFAULT FALSE, CONSTRAINT fk_school_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY (school_id) REFERENCES public.school(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.subject( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, school_id bigint NOT NULL, name varchar NOT NULL, is_deleted boolean DEFAULT FALSE, CONSTRAINT fk_school_subject_id FOREIGN KEY (school_id) REFERENCES public.school(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.school_class( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, school_id bigint NOT NULL, name varchar NOT NULL, is_deleted boolean DEFAULT FALSE, CONSTRAINT fk_school_school_class_id FOREIGN KEY (school_id) REFERENCES public.school(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.user( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, username varchar(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password varchar(255) NOT NULL, email varchar(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), corporate boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, school_id bigint, deleted timestamptz, CONSTRAINT fk_user_school_id FOREIGN KEY (school_id) REFERENCES public.school(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.role (name, description) VALUES ('ADMIN', 'Администратор системы'), ('DIRECTOR', 'Директор школы'), ('DEPUTY_DIRECTOR', 'Заместитель директора (завуч)'), ('TEACHER', 'Учитель'), ('STUDENT', 'Ученик'), ('BASIC_MAKER', 'Базовый составитель'), ('ADVANCED_MAKER', 'Продвинутый составитель'), ('PRO_MAKER', 'Профессиональный составитель'), ('VIEWER', 'Просмотрщик');

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.user_role( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, user_id bigint NOT NULL, role_id bigint NOT NULL, assigned_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.user(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_role_id FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES public.role(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE, UNIQUE (user_id, role_id) );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE class_curriculum ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, schedule_id bigint NOT NULL, school_class_id bigint NOT NULL, subject_id bigint NOT NULL, hours_per_week integer NOT NULL CHECK (hours_per_week > 0), CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_schedule FOREIGN KEY (schedule_id) REFERENCES schedule(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_class FOREIGN KEY (school_class_id) REFERENCES school_class(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, CONSTRAINT fk_curriculum_subject FOREIGN KEY (subject_id) REFERENCES subject(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, UNIQUE (schedule_id, school_class_id, subject_id) ); CREATE TABLE teacher_capacity ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, schedule_id bigint NOT NULL, teacher_id bigint NOT NULL, max_hours_per_week integer NOT NULL CHECK (max_hours_per_week > 0), min_hours_per_week integer CHECK (min_hours_per_week >= 0), CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_schedule FOREIGN KEY (schedule_id) REFERENCES schedule(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_teacher FOREIGN KEY (teacher_id) REFERENCES teacher(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, CONSTRAINT check_min_max_hours CHECK (min_hours_per_week IS NULL OR min_hours_per_week <= max_hours_per_week), UNIQUE (schedule_id, teacher_id) ); CREATE TABLE lesson_assignment ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, class_curriculum_id bigint NOT NULL, teacher_id bigint NOT NULL, hours_per_week integer NOT NULL CHECK (hours_per_week > 0), CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_curriculum FOREIGN KEY (class_curriculum_id) REFERENCES class_curriculum(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_teacher FOREIGN KEY (teacher_id) REFERENCES teacher(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, UNIQUE (class_curriculum_id, teacher_id) ); CREATE TABLE lesson_slot ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, lesson_assignment_id bigint NOT NULL, day_of_week day_type NOT NULL, lesson_number integer NOT NULL CHECK (lesson_number BETWEEN 1 AND 10), cabinet_id bigint, CONSTRAINT fk_slot_assignment FOREIGN KEY (lesson_assignment_id) REFERENCES lesson_assignment(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_slot_cabinet FOREIGN KEY (cabinet_id) REFERENCES cabinet(id) ON DELETE SET NULL );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE public.school_class ADD COLUMN parent_id bigint; ALTER TABLE public.school_class ADD CONSTRAINT fk_school_class_parent_id FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES public.school_class(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE;

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.login_attempt( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, user_id bigint NOT NULL, time timestamptz NOT NULL, success boolean NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.user(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: Shabakhov_Eset
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE public.subscription ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, user_id bigint NOT NULL UNIQUE, plan varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BASIC', expires_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.user(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT chk_subscription_plan CHECK (plan IN ('BASIC','ADVANCED','PRO','VIEWER')) ); CREATE TABLE public.subscription_plan_roles ( plan varchar(50) NOT NULL, role_name role_type NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (plan, role_name), CONSTRAINT chk_spr_plan CHECK (plan IN ('BASIC','ADVANCED','PRO','VIEWER')) ); INSERT INTO public.subscription_plan_roles(plan, role_name) VALUES ('BASIC', 'BASIC_MAKER'), ('ADVANCED', 'ADVANCED_MAKER'), ('ADVANCED', 'BASIC_MAKER'), ('PRO', 'PRO_MAKER'), ('PRO', 'ADVANCED_MAKER'), ('PRO', 'BASIC_MAKER'), ('VIEWER', 'VIEWER'); /* ── Migrate existing PERSONAL users only (corporate = false) ── Corporate users (teachers, directors, etc.) are managed by their school administrator and never use subscriptions. Personal users already have BASIC_MAKER from registration, so we only insert the subscription row. */ /*INSERT INTO public.subscription(user_id, plan, expires_at) SELECT id, 'BASIC', NULL FROM public.user WHERE corporate = false AND deleted IS NULL ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING;*/
